# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

FROM golang:alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app
COPY . .

RUN go mod init github.com/yourusername/your-go-microservice
RUN go get -d -v
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -o main ./...

FROM alpine:latest
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/github.com/yourusername/your-go-microservice/main /app/
ENTRYPOINT ["/app/main"]
